parameters.sqlQuery:
WITH hs AS (
  SELECT LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) AS campaign_key,
         SUM(leads_total) AS leads_total,
         SUM(leads_qualified) AS leads_qualified,
         SUM(leads_disqualified) AS leads_disqualified
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.hubspot_leads_module_daily`
  WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
  GROUP BY LOWER(lead_utm_campaign)
)
SELECT c.channel, c.campaign_name,
       SUM(c.spend) AS spend,
       SUM(hs.leads_total) AS leads_total,
       SUM(hs.leads_qualified) AS leads_qualified,
       SUM(hs.leads_disqualified) AS leads_disqualified,
       SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(hs.leads_qualified), SUM(hs.leads_total)) AS qual_rate
FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.campaigns_daily` c
LEFT JOIN hs ON LOWER(c.campaign_name) = hs.campaign_key
WHERE c.date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
GROUP BY c.channel, c.campaign_name
HAVING leads_total > 0
ORDER BY qual_rate ASC
